principles: Backend authorization is authoritative for protected data and mutations.
Frontend gates mirror backend policy and must prefer backend capabilities when available.
Frontend-only permission checks are compatibility fallbacks, not policy authority.
Policy-changing diffs must update this contract and the matching test guidance.

actions.action: List access users and scoped department users
actions.actor_scope: Platform admin, CRO, global scoped users, and department heads according to access workflow policy
actions.backend_authority: backend/app/api/v1/endpoints/access.py uses the access workflow policy and returns AccessUserRead with backend capabilities

actions.action: Update identity, role, business access, active status, and break-glass state
actions.actor_scope: Platform admin owns identity/Admin-role fields; CRO owns business access fields; backend capabilities narrow per target user
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/access/AccessEditModal.tsx resolves backend capabilities before local fallbacks

actions.action: List paginated user directory mode entries and role facets
actions.actor_scope: Requires users:read; visible user universe is scoped by backend user visibility policy
actions.response_capability: None for directory rows; backend returns available_roles facets
findings: P2: directory frontend route visibility is locally derived from authz rather than backend action capabilities

actions.action: Search directory users, read directory profile details, import directory users, and administer directory deprovision/break-glass lifecycle
actions.actor_scope: Admin-only for directory search/import and admin directory lifecycle; CRO/Risk Manager users with users:read cannot import directory users
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/access.py AccessUserCapabilities.can_break_glass_enable for access review surfaces; directory import responses expose lifecycle result fields, not action capability objects

actions.action: Read risk lists, detail, lookups, linked controls, and linked vendors
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read plus department, owner, or linked-entity visibility helpers
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/authz/policy.ts, frontend/src/components/PermissionGate.tsx, and risk detail components, frontend/src/pages/RisksPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/risks/, frontend/src/components/risks/detail-overview/
findings: P3: risk read/action rows do not expose per-row capability metadata comparable to vendors or controls

actions.action: Create and update risks, including approval-required sensitive changes
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:write; sensitive/high-risk updates use can_resolve_approvals or queue approval
findings: P3: frontend mutation affordances use local permission gates; backend remains authoritative

actions.action: Archive, restore, and delete-approval request
actions.actor_scope: Delete permission plus delete authorization helper; privileged approvers may execute immediately
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/RiskDetailPage.tsx and risk table action gates
findings: P3: lifecycle actions are not represented as backend per-risk capability metadata

actions.action: Read control lists, detail, linked risks, and monitoring context
actions.actor_scope: Requires controls:read plus department/linked-risk visibility helpers
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/control.py ControlCapabilities on detail/list serialization where available
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/ControlDetailPage.tsx and controls components, frontend/src/pages/ControlsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/controls/

actions.action: Create, update, link risks, unlink risks, archive, and restore controls
actions.actor_scope: Requires controls:write or controls:delete depending on action; sensitive updates can queue approvals
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/control.py ControlCapabilities currently focuses on execution logging
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/components/PermissionGate.tsx and control detail/list components, frontend/src/pages/ControlsPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/controls/, frontend/src/components/LinkManagementDialog.tsx, frontend/src/components/linking/linkModes.ts
findings: P3: control capabilities do not yet cover all lifecycle and link actions

actions.action: Log and read control executions
actions.actor_scope: Requires controls:execute for writes and controls:read for reads; detail view exposes can_log_execution

actions.action: Read KRI lists, detail, breaches, due-soon/overdue, and linked vendors
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read plus KRI/risk department and reporting-owner visibility helpers
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/kri.py KRI history responses expose history capabilities; base KRI rows do not
findings: P3: base KRI rows do not expose per-row action capabilities

actions.action: Create, update, archive, restore, and link vendor-backed KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:write or risks:delete depending on action; department/vendor visibility checked on linked entities
findings: P3: lifecycle gates are permission-derived in the UI

actions.action: Submit values, read history, and request corrections
actions.actor_scope: Submit uses ensure_can_submit_value; correction requires risks:write and readable KRI unless privileged approver executes immediately

actions.action: Request, list, read, approve, reject, cancel, and inspect approval side effects
actions.actor_scope: Requesting uses resource-specific delete/update helpers; resolving uses can_resolve_approvals
actions.response_capability: Approval responses expose effective visibility through queue/list filtering, not action capability objects
findings: P3: approval action availability is policy-derived rather than represented as response capability metadata

actions.action: List, count, mark, and configure current-user notifications plus manual KRI deadline check trigger
actions.actor_scope: Notification reads and mutations are current-user scoped; manual KRI deadline trigger requires approval-resolution authority
actions.service_policy: Current-user ownership checks and can_resolve_approvals for manual KRI deadline trigger
actions.response_capability: None; notification payloads are scoped server-side

actions.action: Read vendor lists, details, grouped views, linked risks, controls, and KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires vendors:read and vendor ownership/department visibility; linked entities require their own read policy
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/vendors/ and frontend/src/types/vendor.ts, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx and frontend/src/pages/VendorDetailPage.tsx

actions.action: Create, update, archive, restore, and mutate vendor links
actions.actor_scope: Requires vendors:write/delete or vendor-owner exception; link mutations require visible vendor and visible target entity
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/vendors/ and vendor detail tabs, frontend/src/pages/VendorsPage.tsx and frontend/src/pages/VendorDetailPage.tsx

actions.action: Export risks, controls, KRIs, vendors, issues, audit trail, summary, and vendor reports
actions.actor_scope: Requires reports:read plus strict explicit department and as-of visibility filters
actions.response_capability: None; exported rows are filtered server-side
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/services/reportApi.ts, frontend/src/services/vendorReportApi.ts, and export dialogs, frontend/src/pages/VendorReportsPage.tsx

actions.action: Read overview, risk, control, KRI, issue, committee, and quarterly dashboard metrics
actions.actor_scope: Requires risks:read, issues:read, or committee access depending on endpoint; scope is applied in backend query helpers
findings: P2: route visibility is local authz; backend remains authoritative for data scope

actions.action: Manage roles, permissions, departments, risk types, questionnaire templates, and approval scenarios
actions.actor_scope: CRO-only business configuration; platform admin is not a business-data authority
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/riskhub.py RoleHubCapabilities and DepartmentHubCapabilities where available
findings: P3: role/department capabilities exist; risk type, questionnaire, and approval-scenario panels should be checked before adding new local gates

actions.action: Read department list, detail, related risks, controls, and KRIs
actions.actor_scope: Requires departments:read plus scoped related-resource permissions where related lists cross domains
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/riskhub.py DepartmentHubCapabilities for Risk Hub department configuration; department detail does not expose action capabilities
findings: P3: department detail UI is read-oriented and locally gated by route permissions

actions.action: Send, open, draft, submit, compare, request clarification, and respond
actions.actor_scope: Risk visibility plus questionnaire policy; risk owner can submit while second-line roles can send/request clarification

actions.action: Create, read, update, link, assign, progress, close, and approve exceptions
actions.actor_scope: Requires issues:read/write/approve plus issue scope, owner assignment, and linked-entity visibility helpers
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/pages/issues/ and frontend/src/components/issues/, frontend/src/pages/IssuesPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssueDetailPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/IssueNewPage.tsx, frontend/src/pages/detail/ContextualIssueAction.tsx
findings: P3: issue row action capabilities are not exposed; backend scope is still authoritative

actions.action: Scan, read, quick-view, and resolve orphaned ownership/dependency items
actions.actor_scope: Governance/CRO access; backend emits per-orphan resolution requirements
actions.response_capability: backend/app/schemas/orphaned_item.py Orphan capabilities: can_resolve, can_view_detail, requires_owner, requires_risk, requires_department

actions.action: Read activity log, entity types, and actions
actions.actor_scope: Requires activity_log:read and blocks platform admins from business activity views
findings: P2: route access is locally derived; backend has the authoritative platform-admin business-data block

actions.action: Authenticate, refresh, bootstrap session, read auth config, and revoke sessions
actions.actor_scope: Session authority is backend JWT/refresh/session version; admin session revocation is platform-admin-only
actions.response_capability: Session/user permissions are returned through auth/bootstrap responses, not per-action capabilities
actions.frontend_gate: frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx and frontend/src/services/session/, frontend/src/authz/useAuthz.ts, frontend/src/hooks/usePermissions.ts, frontend/src/lib/capabilities.ts, frontend/src/routing/, frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx, frontend/src/pages/AdminConsolePage.tsx
